title: astragalus lozani
intro: Astragalus lozani, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Astragalus lozani include boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus lozani can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
